news.t: Fidelity's Blueprint for Options-Based Outcomes at Exchange 2026
Fidelity® Launches Three Actively Managed Liquid Alts ETFs

holdings.infoBox: FHEQ is an equity ETF with a total of 181 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.87%, Apple at 6.94%, Microsoft at 4.18%, Amazon.com at 3.83%, and Alphabet at 3.50%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Hedged Equity ETF (FHEQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in equity securities with market caps similar to the S&P 500 and Russell 1000. The fund seeks capital appreciation, utilizing quantitative analysis of several fundamental factors and put options for downside protection FHEQ was launched on Apr 9, 2024 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.text: The evolving investment landscape in 2026 is being defined by a search for new defensive tools and income. That said, more investors and financial advisors are turning to options-based strategies to a...

data.title: Fidelity® Launches Three Actively Managed Liquid Alts ETFs
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Fidelity Investments® today announced the launch of three actively managed liquid alternatives (alts) ETFs: FBUF, FHEQ, and FYEE.
